title: Swashbucklers
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/9fce6f7faa15d7e033446a2bf8bd67598b0fc584.png)

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/339c35bb64c509e9a0fbbcea7c0e0609780d9656.png)](https://bisecthosting.com/halstudios)

[![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/487b8b37608d7d6fc1eb240cd2c7d0c19d99180a.png)](https://iron-horse.games/)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Z_F8-aWiY9I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Swashbucklers is a ship mod that contains 5 fully functional ships and a weapon

*to note the corvette steamship is still a work in progress, summoned with the command "/summon hpm:corvette_steamship" on versions 1.18-current, and it likely wont be backported

- Each ship has a wreck and a few have a damaged model
- The weapon is a handheld cannon which fires cannonballs with explosive damage
- The first ship in the mod is a swashbuckler, a simple sailing boat slightly better than the vanilla boat
- The second ship is the upgraded swashbuckler, a swashbuckler with better visibility and a cannon
- The raft is a slow, cheap boat with a large amount of storage
- The cutter is a large ship with the speed of a swashbuckler and a large amount of health and storage
- The war/military cutter is a cutter with weapons and more health

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/5b7e26d8c00432221691889d892c9ef8959b35cf.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/cfea3f71877cebc3a9a3468c391a758c97ab4ccd.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/e75e5c94ccf80e36493f6e405cb487227657c829.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/428cf95380c2f619773a19a78f06ef26b99a36d2.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/f000c0dfce7bbdfccf2ac37e46661d3940adc2f8.png)

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/7f936e87496a24d09ad5a159574de2bd053bcd96.png)

  
Other features include:

- A hand cannon

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/11dc514575619b2a7f274e0bef24eb5b5e2a8838.png)

- The cutters enter a damaged stage when the first stage dies/gets destroyed

- The upgraded swashbuckler has a cannon, press H to fire it when you have cannonballs in your inventory

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/9952af26519a2df4b6714d5c4bac3bde28902dd8.png)

Recipes:

* the cannon ball produces 16

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/g6bnDQis/images/02d906fee161a14164fd8eb67a11c5f9e77e6983.png)
